Notice Of Motion For Order Permitting Destruction Of Tangible Evidence; Memorandum Of P/A And Declaration Of Andrew S. Werner In Support Of Deft Phillip Larson'S Motion For Order Permitting Destruction Of Tangible Evidence
Off Calendar Mar-23-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew S. Werner, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Philip Larson
Scott Peebles, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Paula Vail

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Phillip Larson's motion for an order permitting destruction of tangible evidence is denied. However, continued costs of storage shall be divided equally between the parties unless and until the parties agree to destruction of the vessel. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
